what_it_does: Defines a JSON manifest for the ConceptV design system, listing preview cards, global CSS files, design tokens, theme selectors, brand font status, namespace, and source metadata.
observations: components and startingPoints are empty arrays.
The cards array catalogs Brand previews and three UI Kit entries with paths, groups, viewport sizes, subtitles, and names.
The tokens array includes color, shadow, spacing, font, and other CSS custom properties, mostly defined in colors_and_type.css.
Scoped token overrides are included for .zone-palette-cooler and .zone-palette-warmer.
themes maps the cooler and warmer zone palette selectors to labels.
brandFonts records Sora, DM Sans, and JetBrains Mono as ok, each tied to a font token.
fonts is empty while brandFonts carries the font metadata.
standouts: Combines preview-card navigation metadata with a large extracted CSS token ledger.
Includes zone palette pigment variables and derived color-mix tokens.
Records scoped theme overrides alongside root-level tokens.
conventions: Uses CSS custom property names as token identifiers.
Uses path-relative HTML previews for card entries.
Groups most cards under Brand, with separate UI Kit groups for Platform, Vi, and Virtual Hub.
Uses selector-based theme definitions for palette variants.
Represents token kind with broad categories such as color, spacing, font, shadow, and other.
concerns: Spacing tokens include duplicate values across adjacent scale names, such as --s-7 and --s-8 both set to 32px, and --s-9 and --s-10 both set to 40px.
fonts is empty even though brandFonts contains font metadata.
components and startingPoints are empty despite the manifest containing many preview cards.
notes: A design-system manifest that inventories ConceptV preview surfaces, CSS tokens, palette themes, and brand font metadata.
questions: Should empty components and startingPoints indicate absence, deferred extraction, or a different manifest layer?
Why is font metadata stored in brandFonts while fonts remains empty?
Are duplicate spacing values intentional aliases or extraction artifacts?
apparent_themes: Warm paper, ink, gold, bronze, and tan visual language.
Design-token driven theming through CSS custom properties.
Preview-led documentation of brand, component, icon, type, spacing, and UI-kit surfaces.
Scoped palette variation for cooler and warmer zone treatments.
intention_signals: It appears intended to make the design system indexable by combining visual preview entries, token metadata, theme selectors, and font status in one manifest.
novelty: The file distinctively mixes a design-system preview catalog with detailed token extraction, scoped palette overrides, and UI-kit screen entries.
contribution: Provides a structured ledger of ConceptV design previews, color and spacing tokens, theme variants, and brand font metadata that a fused system would keep as design-language inventory.
summary_for_embedding: JSON manifest for a ConceptV design system containing preview cards, CSS token definitions, palette theme selectors, brand font status, and SPA source metadata.
intention_for_embedding: The file was for indexing and presenting the ConceptV design system’s visual language, previews, tokens, themes, and fonts.
